# AccessoryControlDevice.Error.accessoryNotCapable

**Case**

An error indicating the accessory doesn’t support the requested capability.

## Declaration

```swift
case accessoryNotCapable
```

## Error cases

- **AccessoryControlDevice.Error.invalidRequest**: An error indicating an invalid request.
- **AccessoryControlDevice.Error.invalidated**: An error indicating a configuration that the system has invalidated.
- **AccessoryControlDevice.Error.unknown**: An error indicating an unknown error.
